nouns.summary: The text states that Ἀσὰφ “ἐγέννησεν” (gave birth to) Ἰωσαφάτ, meaning he fathered Jehoshaphat.
The text says Ἰωσαφάτ “ἐγέννησεν” (gave birth to) Ἰωράμ, meaning he fathered Jehoram.
The text indicates that Ἰωράμ “ἐγέννησεν” (gave birth to) Ὀζίαν, meaning he fathered Uzziah.
Ὀζίαν is presented as the person who is born to Ἰωράμ (“ἐγέννησεν … τὸν Ὀζίαν”), so Uzziah is the child in this parent-child sequence.
